title: rubus procerus var. hamulosus
intro: Rubus procerus var. hamulosus, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a plant species belonging to the Rubus genus, characterized by its edible fruits and medicinal properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiproliferative effects. The health benefits of Rubus procerus var. hamulosus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Rubus procerus var. hamulosus is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs, to support overall health and well-being.
